title: cynoglossum angustifolium
intro: Cynoglossum angustifolium, also known as Chinese forget-me-not, is a flowering plant belonging to the borage family. It is used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may help to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating respiratory issues. Cynoglossum angustifolium can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically proven.
